# Chapter 2: Functions and graphs  (~80 pp)
- 2.1 Functions as mappings (10)
- 2.2 Polynomials, rational functions (12)
- 2.3 Exponentials and logarithms (12)
- 2.4 Trigonometric functions (10)
- 2.5 Inverse functions (8)
- 2.6 Reading a graph: shape, slope, asymptote, scale (15)
- 2.7 Failure section: log-scale traps and linear extrapolation (13)

**Archetype**: scaling. **Project**: read ten plots from primary engineering literature; identify what each axis is hiding. **Exercises**: 30.
